name: Front center column
notes: Front main frame column, paired with piece 10 (back). Carries a row of '+' axle-hole markers at regular intervals (axle ids deferred to M2 cross-plate sidecar pass; the ones piercing pieces 4 and 10 include the motor-wheel, middle-wheel, escapement-wheel, minute-hand, and hour-hand axles). Per Panel D, pieces 4 and 10 collectively carry a₂₉–h₂₉ connection labels; the a–d split to piece 4 and e–h split to piece 10 is an assumption, to be confirmed during the Inkscape hand-edit pass (M1 task 1.5). Both columns also carry f₂₅/g₂₅ — piece 25 is on plate C and that sidecar does not exist yet (linter will WARN). §II.D notes pieces 91 and 92 glue to piece 4 to separate it from the minute hand wheel; that connection is captured on piece 91/92's side rather than here (no subscripted label on piece 4 documented in Panel D).
